description: Canonical sample traces. This directory is the single source of truth for the demo set: the viewer dropdown, the website, and CI all read from here. CI validates every *.json against the CLI on each build (.github/workflows/validate-samples.yml).

samples.name: Payment Idempotency (proved)
samples.summary: Prove payment capture is idempotent, then implement it. Meta-actions, full lineage, a machine-checked proof, generated tests.

samples.name: Auth State Machine (reachability)
samples.summary: Model ad-hoc auth booleans as an explicit state machine and prove every state is reachable.

samples.name: ETL Refactor (conformance)
samples.summary: Refactor a CSV transform with generated conformance tests — lineage without formal proofs.

samples.name: Stripe Payment Flow
samples.summary: The flagship: 14 amount-invariant properties proved/refuted over a real payment state machine.

samples.name: Form Validation
samples.summary: Form validation logic with verified state transitions.
